column1: # Latin transliteration rules over SEDRA III vocalised ASCII tokens.
# VET AGAINST: Joju Jacob's East Syriac slides (Dukrana 2024) before relying
# on any value here. Every row is editable; the engine (suriyani/translit.py)
# adds no mappings of its own.
# Known v0 limits, deliberate and flagged:
#  * 'o' (zqapha) is rendered ā = the EAST Syriac reading; West would be o.
#  * Vowel length for i/u is not marked (SEDRA's 5-vowel scheme carries none).
#  * Matres lectionis are NOT contracted: ;eWuOE renders yešuwʿ, not yešūʿ.
#  * Linea occultans (silent-letter line) is present in the source data but
#    not applied: silenced letters still print.

column3: waw; also serves as mater for u/o — not contracted in v0
yudh; also mater for i/e — not contracted in v0
rbasa; East splits into zlama pšiqa/qašya — SEDRA's single 'e' cannot recover the split
